description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with palm trees and shrubs. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and a prominent entryway with a covered porch, adjacent to a driveway and a parked car. The rear of the property includes a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a row of small trees providing privacy. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, offering outdoor living spaces on both levels. The overall layout is open and spacious, with a focus on natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor integration.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and palm trees. The design is sleek and contemporary, with open outdoor spaces and minimalistic finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway with a car, and a prominent palm tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the pool area at the back, with a row of trees along the boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and a line of small trees, with balconies visible on the upper floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the palm tree, side windows, and the pool area extending towards the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, covered porch, and adjacent driveway; minimalistic and open with no decorative columns.
